{{Quote|We paused only long enough for Jace to create a diversionary attack...|[[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]]|<ref name="shw" />}}
The '''Third Battle of Qotile''' was a battle of the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]], the third of five battles fought on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Troiken/Legends|Troiken]]. It was presumably a draw.

The battle itself was a diversion. [[Jace Dallin]] led the forces of Eriaduan Republic Outland Regions Security Force in an attack outside of their [[Mount Avos]] sanctuary against the [[Stark Commercial Combine|Stark Collective]], who had decided to avoid any more attacks in favor of a siege. As the Eriaduan force attacked, a contingent of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] ([[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], and [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]]) and [[Senator/Legends|Senators]] ([[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]] and [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]]), as well as a [[Judicial/Legends|Judicial]] pilot, left Avos through a side-tunnel. They were heading towards the [[Troiken/Legends|Troiken]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] where Gallia and the pilot would steal a [[Quicksilver (Iaco Stark)|Combine ship]] to return the politicians to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], in order to inform the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] and [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] of the war's proceedings.
